EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Rejected Document
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REJECTED DOCUMENT.
Hi {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Contact__c},
The {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Document__c} document has been rejected due to {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.Rejection_Reason__c}.
Please follow the link below to update the document and proceed with your application.
UPLOAD A NEW CERTIFICATE
If you have any questions, feel free to give us a call on 07 4998 5550— we're always happy to help.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
